title: Improvements to the notebook editing experience
body:
The following improvements have been made to the notebook editing experience:

* Add a split view to edit notebooks side by side. See [Edit notebooks side by side](/aws/en/notebooks/basic-editing#splitview).
* Pressing `Cmd + F` (Mac) or `Ctrl + F` (Windows) in a notebook now opens the native Databricks find-and-replace tool. This allows you to quickly search and replace text throughout your entire notebook, including content outside the current viewport. See [Find and replace text](/aws/en/notebooks/notebook-editor#find-and-replace-text).
* Quickly switch between tab groups based on authoring contexts using the , , and  icons on the top left in the editor. See [Switch between authoring contexts](/aws/en/workspace/navigate-workspace#authoring-contexts).
